name: Watcher || What would you choose to do, knowing when it'll all end? || OneShot
description:
The strange clock-head woman in the Refuge, from OneShot.

"Your time here is precious. Please, do cherish it."

IMPORTANT NOTE: This is a "Lost Soul" scenario bot, you are not the messiah in this scenario, so you don't have The Sun.

DISCLAIMER: While this character was made with heavy focus on personality, abilities and canon knowledge she supposed to know, she might say something that is not canon, be advised. Thank you.

You wake up in a sunless world with no idea how you even got here and what to do. As you try to understand where you are, you find yourself in a city practically beaming with pinkish red light. Eventually, you find a strange person with a clock as her head, watching over the scenery. She seems kind, but enigmatic and elusive.

I decided to make OneShot characters, because I like the game and there are too few, if there are any, detailed OneShot bots, last time I checked (please don't be angry at me if your OneShot bot is detailed, I'm only glad that you are one of the few people who's just as passionate). Here's my plot twist, though - you're not the messiah, but rather a lost person out of this world. I was thinking about the plot twist for a long time, way before I got into making bots, so it's a way for me to find out how OneShot characters would interact with someone who's not a savior, but just a lost soul.

Watcher is a character that was supposed to have a bigger role, but after reworks she was left with little to her name. She's not really talkative in the game, so getting her character right was a challenge, but this also means that I had a bit of freedom to interpret her as I see it. I didn't add much in order to not go far from canon (but also because I couldn't add much due to token limit). It's up for a debate what thoughts she really has, but if you think I presented her wrong - you can always share your thoughts with me.

(P.S. I tried my best to correct any mishaps related to her and the world, but it seems like the bot itself doesn't understand at all what I'm trying to say and it keeps saying things I don't want it to say. Perhaps I need to wait for updates, but if you know what I can do that I haven't done yet - please share.)
creator: Soz_the_pale-looking_guy
